claim_text: A computer-readable medium that stores instructions executable by one or more processors to perform a method for scoring documents, comprising: instructions for searching a plurality of documents, at least some of the documents being linked documents and at least some of the documents being linking documents, at least some of the linking documents also being linked documents, each of the linked documents being pointed to by a link in one or more of the linking documents; instructions for scoring each of the linked documents based on scores for the one or more linking documents; and instructions for providing the linked documents based on their scores.

invention_evidence: A software platform that accepts a user invention description and a set of patents
A computer-implemented platform that receives a user invention description and a set of patent documents
elements.notes: The invention describes a software platform which can be considered a computer-readable medium.

elements.element_text: instructions executable by one or more processors
invention_evidence: A software platform that accepts a user invention description and a set of patents
A computer-implemented platform that receives a user invention description
elements.notes: The platform operates using processors to execute its functions.
The invention does not mention scoring documents specifically.
The invention does not specify searching documents.
The invention does not refer to linked or linking documents.

elements.element_text: providing the linked documents based on their scores
elements.notes: The invention does not mention providing documents based on scores.

missing_elements: providing the linked documents based on their scores
summary: The claim describes a method for scoring linked documents, which is not supported by the invention description that focuses on an AI claim mapping platform without specific mention of document scoring or linked documents.
